title: Splitting a String Into Descending Consecutive Values
titleCn: 将字符串拆分为递减的连续值

testcases.input: s = "1234" Output: false Explanation: There is no valid way to split s.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: There is no valid way to split s.

testcases.input: s = "050043" Output: true Explanation: s can be split into ["05", "004", "3"] with numerical values [5,4,3]. The values are in descending order with adjacent values differing by 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: s can be split into ["05", "004", "3"] with numerical values [5,4,3]. The values are in descending order with adjacent values differing by 1.

testcases.input: s = "9080701" Output: false Explanation: There is no valid way to split s.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: There is no valid way to split s.
